summary: Access Types Permission Modification Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 9/9 passed (PUT superviseur/employe, PUT admin blocked, DELETE role-override, GET has_overrides). Frontend Desktop: 'Modifier les permissions' button works, edit mode shows Annuler/Enregistrer, save works with success toast. Frontend Mobile (375px): Responsive layout stacks vertically, no horizontal scroll, all buttons accessible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Access types permission modification feature fully tested. PUT endpoints for superviseur/employe work correctly, admin modification is blocked. DELETE role-override resets to defaults. Frontend GestionTypesAcces.jsx component works on both desktop and mobile with responsive layout.

1_backend_put_superviseur.details: PUT /api/demo/access-types/superviseur with modified permissions returns success

2_backend_put_employe.details: PUT /api/demo/access-types/employe with modified permissions returns success

6_frontend_desktop_modifier_button.details: Desktop: 'Modifier les permissions' button visible for Superviseur

7_frontend_desktop_edit_mode.details: Desktop: Click enables checkboxes, shows Annuler + Enregistrer buttons

8_frontend_desktop_save.details: Desktop: Enregistrer saves changes, success toast appears

9_frontend_mobile_responsive.details: Mobile (375px): Layout stacks vertically (flex-direction: column), no horizontal scroll

responsive_layout_verified.desktop_1920px: Sidebar + detail panel side by side
responsive_layout_verified.mobile_375px: Sidebar + detail panel stacked vertically, no horizontal scroll
